  • Uses of DesignEvaluationResult in neqsim.process.mechanicaldesign.expander

    Methods in neqsim.process.mechanicaldesign.expander that return DesignEvaluationResult
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    DesignEvaluationResult
    TurboExpanderCompressorMechanicalDesign.evaluateDesignAtConditions(double expInletP, double expOutletP, double expInletT, double compInletP, double compDischargeP, double compInletT, double expMassFlow, double compMassFlow, double expMolarMass, double compMolarMass)
    Evaluate whether the fixed mechanical design can handle the given operating conditions.
    DesignEvaluationResult
    TurboExpanderCompressorMechanicalDesign.evaluateDesignWithFluid(SystemInterface expanderFluid, double expOutletP, SystemInterface compressorFluid, double compDischargeP)
    Evaluate the design using full thermodynamic fluid objects for more accurate results.

    Method
    Description
    List<DesignEvaluationResult>
    TurboExpanderCompressorMechanicalDesign.evaluateMultipleScenarios(List<String> scenarioNames, List<Map<String,Double>> scenarios)
